title: Network Security, Attacks, Segmentation, and Hardening · Packet Lens: Net Wireless Name Attacks
summary: Threat-model and harden enterprise, guest, IoT, OT, management, and remote-access network zones. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net wireless name attacks increment in a defense-in-depth network security plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain evil twin, rogue AP, DNS poisoning or spoofing, and on-path behavior with detection and user impact.
Explain VLAN hopping, MAC flooding, ARP poisoning or spoofing, rogue DHCP, and their switching impact and evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
